extracted_codes.context: 282.69 Other sickle cell disease with crisis
If number of diagnoses for sickle cell trait diagnoses > qualifying sickle cell disease diagnoses 282.5 Sickle cell trait

clinical_criteria: Two outpatient visits at least 30 days apart OR one hospitalization in the electronic medical record
Qualifying diagnosis must be in problem list, medical history, primary diagnosis at encounter, non-primary diagnosis at encounter, or discharge diagnosis
Exclusion if number of sickle cell trait diagnoses > qualifying sickle cell disease diagnoses
algorithm_summary: The phenotype identifies patients with sickle cell disease using a two-step process: 1) Presence of qualifying ICD-9 codes for sickle cell disease (282.41, 282.42, 282.60, 282.61, 282.62, 282.63, 282.64, 282.68, 282.69) in problem list, encounter diagnosis, or discharge diagnosis, AND 2) Evidence of ongoing care with either two outpatient visits at least 30 days apart or one hospitalization. Patients are excluded if they have more sickle cell trait diagnoses (282.5) than qualifying sickle cell disease diagnoses, to prevent identification of misdiagnosed patients.
